---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or new check for CloudSentinel
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I want to be able to scan my ECS resources..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include any proposed check names, IDs, or expected finding format.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, mockup screenshots, or references (e.g. AWS documentation or CIS Benchmarks) here.
